description.description: A short description of the accelerator profile.

displayName.description: The display name of the accelerator profile.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the accelerator profile is available for new resources.

identifier.description: The resource identifier of the accelerator device. Example: nvidia.com/gpu

tolerations.description: Any number of Kubernetes toleration values that are added to resources when created or updated to this accelerator profile.

effect.description: Taint effect. Empty matches all effects. Allowed: 'NoSchedule', 'PreferNoSchedule', 'NoExecute'.

key.description: Taint key. Empty matches all keys.

operator.description: Relationship with the value. Valid: 'Exists', 'Equal'. Defaults to 'Equal'.

tolerationSeconds.description: Duration in seconds. If effect is 'NoExecute', specifies eviction time. Default is forever.

value.description: Tolerance value. If key is empty, use 'Exists' to match all values and keys.
